PETSc: solves PETSc backend kernels reused by optimization, UQ, and numerical-backbone workflows, PETSc low-level numeric or geometric primitives inside a linked execution adapter. Best for PETSc inside optimization, UQ, and numerical-backbone workflows. Avoid Using PETSc as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside optimization, UQ, and numerical-backbone workflows, Treating PETSc as implicitly verified without its linked runtime and evidence bundle.
